    My Projects

    This is some of what I coded. I coded both the front-end and the back-end. I also set up the databases. Some of the websites get data through API...

    Project Github This is a static website that is not connected with a database but uses API to retrieve data about weather. To create it I used HTML, CSS and JavaScript
    Project Github This is a static website that is not connected with a database. The data about bicycles and services are retrieved from a JSON file. To create it I used HTML, CSS and JavaScript
    Project Github This is a dynamic website that is connected to a MariaDB database. To create it I used HTML, CSS, JavaScript and core PHP
    Project Github This is a dynamic website connected with a MariaDB database. To create it I used Yii2 PHP framework, some vanilla JavaScript and CSS
    Project Github This is an SPA that retrieves data about menus from API. To create it I used HTML, CSS and vanilla OOP JavaScript.
    Project Github This is a dynamic web store. To create it I used PHP, HTML, CSS, SCSS and some JavaScript. The data are stored in MariaDB and retrieved from it with SQL.
    Project Github This is a dynamic website. To create it I used Node.js, JavaScript, EJS, HTML, CSS. The data are stored in MongoDB.

    Console and desktop apps

    Project Github This is a console game application programmed with Java
    Project Github This is a Windows Forms App (.NET Framework)
    Project Github This is a repository with my Python code

    Shell programming

    Project Github This is the Rock Paper Scissors game
